title: Trident checkpoint record
description: One line of runs/<runId>/checkpoints.jsonl: a resumable per-iteration snapshot of an agent loop, for human-in-loop OBSERVABILITY + control, Claude-Code-native (files + re-invocation, no API). Format CONFORMS TO three authorities (see failures/decisions.jsonl PD authority for urls): (1) OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions — the decision-graph spans + gen_ai.* attrs; (2) LangGraph human-in-the-loop — checkpoint/interrupt/resume/rollback + approve/edit/reject/respond; (3) Anthropic trustworthy agents — transparency, stopping conditions, pause-before-irreversible.

parent.description: iteration this resumes from — LangGraph time-travel / rollback.

spans.description: Executed decision graph from prongs/spans.mjs (reduced OpenInference/OTel GenAI). Executed, not narrated.

awaiting.description: LangGraph HITL decision types offered at an interrupt (pause).

human.description: The human disposition on resume: {decision, note}. propose != dispose — nothing auto-applies.
